title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at South Indian Bank

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at South Indian Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with South Indian Bank! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Noida team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About South Indian Bank:
South Indian Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with South Indian Bank!
